question: Who founded Zephyr Dynamics and what position do they currently hold?
expected_answer: Zephyr Dynamics was founded by Dr. Elena Marsh, who currently serves as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).
source_context: The company was founded by Dr. Elena Marsh, who currently serves as Chief Executive Officer.

question: When and where was Zephyr Dynamics founded?
expected_answer: Zephyr Dynamics was founded in March 2019 in Boulder, Colorado.
source_context: Zephyr Dynamics Inc. was founded in March 2019 in Boulder, Colorado.

question: What is the maximum flight time of the Zephyr One on a single charge?
expected_answer: The Zephyr One has a maximum flight time of 34 minutes on a single fully charged battery.
source_context: Maximum flight time is 34 minutes on a single fully charged battery.

question: What is the maximum transmission range of the Zephyr One?
expected_answer: The maximum transmission range is 12 kilometers in an unobstructed environment.
source_context: The maximum transmission range is 12 kilometers in an unobstructed environment.

question: What are the camera specifications of the Zephyr One?
expected_answer: The Zephyr One has a 48-megapixel camera that records 4K video at 60 frames per second.
source_context: The onboard camera is 48 megapixels and records 4K video at 60 frames per second.

question: What is the battery capacity and how long does it take to charge?
expected_answer: The battery is a 2200 mAh lithium-polymer pack that takes 68 minutes to charge.
source_context: The battery is a 2200 mAh lithium-polymer pack with a charge time of 68 minutes.

question: What is the top speed of the Zephyr One in Sport mode?
expected_answer: In Sport mode the Zephyr One reaches a maximum speed of 68 kilometers per hour.
source_context: In Sport mode the Zephyr One reaches a maximum speed of 68 kilometers per hour.

question: How much does the Zephyr One Fly More combo cost and what does it add?
expected_answer: The Fly More combo costs 1,049 US dollars and adds two extra batteries and a carry case.
source_context: The Zephyr One Fly More combo, which adds two extra batteries and a carry case, costs 1,049 US dollars.

question: How long is the Zephyr One warranty and what does it exclude?
expected_answer: The warranty lasts 24 months from the date of purchase and excludes crash damage and water damage.
source_context: The Zephyr One includes a 24-month warranty from the date of purchase. The warranty covers manufacturing defects but does not cover crash damage or water damage.

question: What does Zephyr Care Plus cost and what does it cover?
expected_answer: Zephyr Care Plus costs 129 US dollars per year and covers accidental damage, including up to two replacement units per year.
source_context: Zephyr Care Plus is an optional protection plan costing 129 US dollars per year. It covers accidental damage and includes up to two replacement units per year.

question: What is the default altitude limit of the Zephyr One?
expected_answer: By default the flight altitude is software-capped to 500 meters above the takeoff point.
source_context: By default, the flight altitude is software-capped to 500 meters above the takeoff point.

question: Does the Zephyr One require FAA registration for recreational use, and why?
expected_answer: No. Because the Zephyr One weighs 249 grams, it falls under the 250-gram threshold and does not require FAA registration for recreational use.
source_context: Because the Zephyr One weighs 249 grams, it falls under the 250-gram threshold and does not require FAA registration for recreational use.

question: What are the customer support hours for Zephyr Dynamics?
expected_answer: Customer support is available Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Mountain Time.
source_context: Support hours are Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Mountain Time.
